revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-1-055

Any area, structure or part of a structure designated for the transfer of personnel or materials between a vessel and the shore or structure.

Note: The French term cale denotes a gently sloping area on which a landing can be made.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Landing }}
